resources.string: Add a note (what was this expense for?)
Align inventory carrying cost with iOS analytics
Annual percentage rate for holding cost calculation
Based on aging and market conditions, consider a price reduction to accelerate sale.
Clear filters to see all leads
Client follow-ups, debts and inventory reminders
Add a vehicle first to record a sale.
Email support for sync or account issues
Everything you need to grow your dealership business.
Example: With 15% annual rate on a $10,000 vehicle:
Holding cost is %s%% of total cost. Consider faster turnover.
Holding costs are %s%% of vehicle cost. Consider faster turnover.
Holding costs represent the daily expense of keeping a vehicle in your inventory.
Invite accepted. Use the business switcher to change organizations.
Invite code saved. Sign in to apply.
Join Car Dealer Tracker using my invite code %1$s. Subscribe and we both get an extra month free. %2$s
Load the finance snapshot used for delivery
Merge duplicate vehicles, clients, users and accounts
Monthly finance snapshot, preview and test delivery
No expenses recorded for this vehicle
Password reset email sent! Check your inbox.
Password updated successfully. Please sign in with your new password.
Please sign in to accept the invitation.
Projected ROI is %s%%. Consider cost reduction or price increase.
Request permanent removal of your account and all data
ROI is %s%%. Consider reviewing pricing strategy.
Tap + to add a new client
This affects currency formatting, mileage units, and app language.
This interaction will be removed from the client timeline.
This reminder and its notification will be removed.
Track daily cost of keeping vehicles in inventory
Vehicle has been in inventory for %d days. Consider aggressive pricing.
Vehicle has been in inventory for %d days. Monitor closely.
Vehicle has been in inventory for %d days. Review pricing strategy.
Vehicle has healthy margin. Consider a small price reduction to accelerate sale.
What is this client looking for?
Your Pro subscription is active. Enjoy full access.
Create an account to use %s with sync, team access and cloud backup.
You do not have permission to open %s.
Free plan includes up to 3 vehicles. Upgrade to Pro to add unlimited inventory.
Switch to a business in Account first
Invite teammates by email and assign the correct role.
Create a login immediately instead of sending only an invite code.
This will cancel the pending invite for %s.
This will remove %s from the team.
Full owner access across the business.
Full access to operations, analytics and team management.
Deal-focused access with inventory and leads, but no team administration.
Read-only visibility with restricted sales and finance actions.
Record vehicle sales and close deals.
Browse parts catalog and stock levels.
Add, edit, and remove parts from inventory.
Sell parts and record part sales.
Open CRM, leads and follow-up lists.
See expense history and spend data.
Access cost data for each vehicle.
Access deal profit and margin data.
Access part sale profit and margin data.
Invite members and edit their access.
Remove vehicles, users and other records.
Access financial accounts and overall financial data.
Paste the invite code you received from the business owner.
Only owners and admins can manage email reports.
Email reports are available to owners and admins only.
All owner and admin members with a resolved email address.
No owner or admin email address is available for delivery.
Realized sales profit, monthly expenses, and net cash movement
Preview and export the same finance snapshot that will back future email delivery.
Create local backups, generate PDF reports, or archive your entire dataset to the cloud.
Cloud backup runs when your business account is active.
Run a quick check to compare local data, remote data, and queued changes.
No spending data for this period
Add your first expense to start tracking spending.
Record your first sale to see profit analytics.
No financial accounts available. Add at least one cash or bank account before completing this sale.
Select the account where this payment should be deposited.
A new version of Car Dealer Tracker is available. Please update to continue using the app.
Create a new password to regain access.\nYou\'ll sign in again after saving.
Password must be at least 6 characters long.
Please enter your email address to reset your password.
Changes the password for the currently signed-in account.
Revenue, payment method and deposit account are locked so taxes, fees and collected cash stay correct.
Only owner or admin can change these settings.
We couldn\'t load Deal Desk settings right now. Please try again.
We couldn\'t save Deal Desk settings right now. Please try again.
Deal Desk settings are available to owners and admins only.
Build taxable sale totals from the same template system used on iOS.
Existing dealers stay off until someone turns this on. Old sales stay untouched.
Tax and fee templates for vehicle sales
USA template lines are placeholders until you enter your local taxes and fees.
USA tax lines are placeholders until you enter your local rates.
USA fee lines are placeholders until you enter your local amounts.
Canada template lines are placeholders until you enter your local taxes and fees.
Canada tax lines are placeholders until you enter your local rates.
Canada fee lines are placeholders until you enter your local amounts.
Generic template starts empty. Add only the taxes and fees you actually collect.
Generic tax line is optional. Enter it only if you collect tax.
Generic fee line is optional. Enter it only if you collect fees.
Loading tax and fee settings for this business.
Deal Desk settings are unavailable, so this sale uses the standard flow.
Use the same tax, fee and payment snapshot as iOS.
Full customer total is collected today.
Share your referral link and earn Pro bonus months when other dealers subscribe.
Pull down to refresh referral rewards.
This name appears in expenses, team activity and reports.
Keep this short and recognizable for your dealership team.
Structured around realized sales profit, monthly expenses, and cash movement instead of one synthetic net figure.
A faster operator-level scan before the detailed tables.
Fast visual comparison of the month\'s core metrics.
Top categories from expenses recorded inside the report month.
Closed vehicle deals for this report month.
Profit and cash movement are both positive.
Sold units closed below their tracked cost basis.
Withdrawals are higher than deposits for the month.
No strong positive or negative signal in this period.
No expenses recorded in this month.
No vehicle sales recorded in this month.
No part sales recorded in this month.
No profitable vehicle sales in this month.
No loss-making vehicle sales in this month.
Open the finance snapshot used for PDF export
Deep dive into your business performance.
Permanently remove your account and cloud data
This will permanently delete your account and all cloud data.
Type DELETE and re-enter your account email to continue.
Suggest features and vote on requests from other dealers
Tell us what to build next
Add ideas, vote for requests, and help prioritize updates.
Every registered dealer can suggest improvements and vote, even without Pro.
Be the first to suggest what would make the app better for your dealership.
Help decide what we build next
Post one clear idea, then vote on requests from other dealers.
Your idea will be removed from the board. Completed ideas stay visible.
Explain why this would help your dealership.
